positive: Stylized, geometric illustration of a majestic flying serpent woven into a symmetrical mandala pattern. The serpent should be composed of intricate, tribal-inspired linework and negative space, forming a dynamic, circular composition centered on a bright, ethereal glowing pearl. Background should be deep indigo and midnight blue, contrasting sharply with glowing neon turquoise and gold accents. Utilize clean silhouettes, strong graphic lines, and limited, high-contrast color palette suitable for screen printing on black fabric. Minimalist yet maximalist energy. Intricate detail, perfect symmetry, vector art style, tattoo flash sheet aesthetic, highly detailed.
